languages.original_text: "Confirming attempted disruption of retrocausality, classified as a minor chronoanomaly. Investigation is impossible due to the tech-heretical nature of the offending entity. Eradication of the anomaly is impossible due to its absence from the field of view."

languages.text: "Подтверждаю попытку нарушения ретропричинности, классифицируемую как малую хроноаномалию. Исследование невозможно в силу техноеретической природы нарушителя. Эрадикация источника аномалии невозможна в силу его отсутствия в поле видимости".
languages.translation_comment: after the battle with the Necron Chronomancer inside the Trazyn Museum

languages.text: "Confirming attempted disruption of retrocausality, classified as a minor chronoanomaly. Investigation is impossible due to the tech-heretical nature of the offending entity. Eradication of the anomaly is impossible due to its absence from the field of view."

"Confirming attempted disruption of retrocausality, classified as a minor chronoanomaly. Investigation is impossible due to the tech-heretical nature of the offending entity. Eradication of the anomaly is impossible due to its absence from the field of view."

languages.text: 「因果関係の観測可能な乱れを確認。軽度のクロノアノマリーと分類。その原因となる存在の技術的異端性により調査は不可能。その存在が視野内に不在のため、アノマリーは消滅不可能」
languages.original_text: "Confirming the observable disruption of cause and effect, classified as a minor chronoanomaly. Investigation is impossible due to the tech-heretical nature of its carrier. Eradication of the anomaly is impossible due to the absence of the carrier in the field of view."

traits.locale_text: 「因果関係の観測可能な乱れを確認。軽度のクロノアノマリーと分類。その原因となる存在の技術的異端性により調査は不可能。その存在が視野内に不在のため、アノマリーは消滅不可能。」

languages.text: « Confirmation d'une tentative de perturbation de la rétrocausalité, classifiée comme une chrono-anomalie mineure. Son étude est impossible en raison de la nature technohérétique de l'entité en question, dont l'absence dans notre champ de vision nous empêche également d'éradiquer cette anomalie. »
languages.original_text: "Confirming attempted disruption of retrocausality, classified as a minor chronoanomaly. Investigation is impossible due to the tech-heretical nature of the offending entity. Eradication of the anomaly is impossible due to its absence from the field of view."

traits.locale_text: « Confirmation d'une tentative de perturbation de la rétrocausalité, classifiée comme une chrono-anomalie mineure. Son étude est impossible en raison de la nature technohérétique de l'entité en question, dont l'absence dans notre champ de vision nous empêche également d'éradiquer cette anomalie. »

languages.text: "Bestätige versuchte, als mindere Chronoanomalie klassifizierte, Störung der Retrokausalität. Untersuchung ist angesichts der tech-häretischen Natur der fraglichen Wesenheit nicht möglich. Beseitigung der Anomalie ist unmöglich, da sie sich außerhalb des Sichtfeldes befindet."
languages.original_text: "Confirming attempted disruption of retrocausality, classified as a minor chronoanomaly. Investigation is impossible due to the tech-heretical nature of the offending entity. Eradication of the anomaly is impossible due to its absence from the field of view."

traits.locale_text: "Bestätige versuchte, als mindere Chronoanomalie klassifizierte, Störung der Retrokausalität. Untersuchung ist angesichts der tech-häretischen Natur der fraglichen Wesenheit nicht möglich. Beseitigung der Anomalie ist unmöglich, da sie sich außerhalb des Sichtfeldes befindet."

languages.text: "Neden ve sonucun gözlemlenebilir bozulması doğrulanıyor, küçük bir krono anomali olarak sınıflandırıldı. İhlalci varlığın tekno küfran doğası nedeniyle araştırmak imkânsız. Görüş alanında olmaması nedeniyle anomalinin yok edilmesi imkânsız."
languages.original_text: "Confirming attempted disruption of retrocausality, classified as a minor chronoanomaly. Investigation is impossible due to the tech-heretical nature of the offending entity. Eradication of the anomaly is impossible due to its absence from the field of view."

traits.locale_text: "Neden ve sonucun gözlemlenebilir bozulması doğrulanıyor, küçük bir krono anomali olarak sınıflandırıldı. İhlalci varlığın tekno küfran doğası nedeniyle araştırmak imkânsız. Görüş alanında olmaması nedeniyle anomalinin yok edilmesi imkânsız."

languages.text: «Confirmado un intento de interferencia con la retrocausalidad, clasificado como cronoanomalía menor. La investigación es imposible dada la naturaleza tecnoherética de la entidad responsable. La erradicación de la anomalía es imposible debido a su ausencia del campo visual».
languages.original_text: "Confirming attempted disruption of retrocausality, classified as a minor chronoanomaly. Investigation is impossible due to the tech-heretical nature of the offending entity. Eradication of the anomaly is impossible due to its absence from the field of view."

traits.locale_text: «Confirmado un intento de interferencia con la retrocausalidad, clasificado como cronoanomalía menor. La investigación es imposible dada la naturaleza tecnoherética de la entidad responsable. La erradicación de la anomalía es imposible debido a su ausencia del campo visual».

languages.text: “确认逆因果破坏企图，归类为轻微时间异常。因违规实体具备技术异端性质，调查无法进行。异常不在视野范围内，无法根除。”
languages.original_text: "Confirming attempted disruption of retrocausality, classified as a minor chronoanomaly. Investigation is impossible due to the tech-heretical nature of the offending entity. Eradication of the anomaly is impossible due to its absence from the field of view."
